name: clinerules
description: Symlinks ~/.clinerules/* into the current project's .clinerules/ directory and keeps the @-import block in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md in sync. Invoke /install-clinerules from any project to wire up the global ruleset.

plugins.name: clinerules
plugins.description: Provides the /install-clinerules skill — symlinks ~/.clinerules/* into the current project root's .clinerules/ directory and updates the @-import block in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md.
